'''Llollulion''' was a wealthy [[Borlovian]] who, weary of his race's predisposition with stability, became [[Booster Terrik]]'s copilot during the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler's]] early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Starwayman]]''. Imprisoned for smuggling, he escaped custody of the [[Moderate Security Ward]] of the [[CoCo Penitentiary]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

{{Char-stub}}
